title: OperationsResponse
description: Response envelope for the response containing multiple operations objects.

msg.description: Message indicating the status of the request overall.

totalItems.description: The total number of operations in the database for the given query.

totalPages.description: Total number of pages that client can iterate through.

ctime.description: Unix timestamp of when the underlying data was last updated.

now.description: Unix timestamp of the current UTC time on the server.

ptime.description: Time taken on API server to process the request, in milliseconds.
